_comment: Mainnet listing restraint overlay (PRD_23 §8.5 · MAINNET_READINESS C-1-F). Applied only when NEXT_PUBLIC_LISTING_MODE='true' (production cafepi). English is the primary review language and also serves as the fallback overlay for all non-ko locales. Principle: token/issuance/economy wording -> points/grant (removes 'non-Pi Tokens' impression, requirement A-5).

whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implements PiRC1 (Bean Points) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transactions).
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Grants = Circulation + Retrieval) is constantly verified. Over-granting and double-spending are structurally impossible.
